opinion.h: HALL v. HEARD, ACTING CORRECTIONS DIRECTOR. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF CRIMINAL APPEALS OF TEXAS. No. 1269, Misc. Decided June 18, 1962.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE FRANKFURTER took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
370 U.S. 291 WILBUR v. UNITED STATES. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA. No. 1383, Misc. Decided June 18, 1962.
Solicitor General Cox for the United States.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed.
MR. JUSTICE FRANKFURTER took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
